data.raceName: LADBROKES RACING EXTRAS IN MULTI HT4 MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. PUNTERS JEWEL has been hard to fault of late and he made it two in a row when successful at his latest appearance over 2040m at this track, getting home by 12 metres. Won't find this any harder and he can take care of this line-up. 6. COMMODORE JUJON was good when beaten just 2m as runner-up last start at Albion Park. Draws wider but came from a similar barrier to place here three back. Big chance. 1. DOCTA FEELGOOD has been a model of consistency of late and deserved his success last time out, scoring by 1.2 metres over 1780m at this track. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Primary contender in a similar assignment. 9. TRALEE SNICKAS is suited coming back to this circuit having scored a win here two back.","runners":[8,6,1,9],"exclusive":false}
